mission.title: netdata: Building packages for Ubuntu 20.04 (Focal)
mission.description: Building packages for Ubuntu 20.04 (Focal). Requested by 14+ users.

steps.title: Check current netdata setup
steps.description:
Verify your netdata version and configuration:
```bash
netdata version
```
This feature requires a working netdata installation.

steps.title: Review netdata configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant netdata configuration:
Currently only packages up to Ubuntu 19.10 (Eoan) are available on Packagecloud. Please add the build for Ubuntu 20.04 (Focal).

steps.title: Apply the fix for Building packages for Ubuntu 20.04 (Focal)
steps.description:
##### Summary

- Fixes #8906

##### Component Name

- area/packaging

##### Test Plan

```#!sh
root:~# apt-get update
Get:1 http://10.0.0.109:8000 focal InRelease [2,774 B]
Get:2 http://10.0.0.109:8000 focal/main amd64 Packages [2,120 B]
Hit:3 http://au.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu focal InRelease
Hit:4 http://au.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu focal-updates InRelease
Hit:5 http://au.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu focal-backports InRelease
Hit:6 http://au.archive.ubuntu.com/ubuntu focal-security

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Upgrade netdata to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade netdata:
```bash
# Check current version
netdata version
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/netdata/netdata
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Building packages for Ubuntu 20.04 (Focal)" is functioning correctly.

prerequisites.description: A working netdata installation or development environment.
